prestazioni: Engine swap to a Toyota 1HD-FTE 4.2L turbo-diesel inline-6 (1HD-FTE) with a Garrett GT4202 turbocharger (84mm inducer, 1.15 A/R turbine housing) paired with a custom 4-inch stainless steel exhaust system featuring a dual-wall downpipe and a 304-grade muffler by Tomei for reduced backpressure and optimized spool characteristics

Full fuel system upgrade including a Bosch CP3 high-pressure fuel pump (1600cc/min flow rate), 1000cc Delphi injectors, and a custom ECU remap via Haltech Elite 2500 with flex-fuel capability (E85 compatible) and boost-by-gear tuning (35 psi max on 98 RON fuel)

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins TTX46 coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 100mm travel) and custom-fabricated front and rear anti-roll bars (25mm diameter, 3mm wall thickness) by Whiteline, paired with polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 63mm) for improved articulation and body control
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Liberty Walk LB Works kit (fiberglass fenders, 3-inch flares) modified to fit the 70 Series chassis, paired with a set of Volk Racing TE37SL wheels (17x9 +15 offset, 5x150 PCD) wrapped in Toyo Open Country MT tires (285/70R17)

Full exterior dechroming and ceramic coating (Gyeon Quartz Ceramic Coating) in matte military green (FS 34097), with a custom front bumper delete and replacement by a steel tube winch bumper (ARB Sahara) featuring integrated LED light pods (Rigid Industries D-Series Pro, 50-inch dual-row)

Interior stripped and reupholstered with Recaro SRD seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) in black Alcantara with red stitching, paired with a custom roll cage (8-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) by Custom Cages UK, and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm diameter) on a NRG quick-release hub
